## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] UI/UX polish
- [ ] Build/release
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I did not commit `dist/`, `release/`, installers, or `node_modules/`
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I understand contributions are submitted under the repository source license

## Screenshots or recordings

Add screenshots for UI changes when helpful.
